rulings.Case Title: CYRUS LAFARRE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Notice From Record
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 17, 2014, line 13. DEFENDANT R W W PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens GRANTED. "No violation of [HBOR] shall affect the validity of a sale in favor of a bona fide purchaser and any of its encumbrances for value without notice". CC 2924.12(e). Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence probable validly of its claims against a bona fide purchaser or that moving defendant is not a bona fide purchaser. Defendant's objections to Plaintiff's Declaration are (1) sustained as to paragraphs 5, 9, 10, and 15; and (2) overruled as to paragraphs 6, 7, 11, 12, 13, and 14. Request for attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $3,310. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE C. CHAN ET AL VS. KIMBERLY REYES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 17, 2014, line 14. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY REYES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
